saints.name: Hieromartyr Simeon, kinsman of the Lord, second Bishop of Jerusalem

troparion.text:
The Church glorifies you as a kinsman of Christ, O Hierarch Simeon,  / and as a steadfast martyr, for
courageously you destroyed all deceptions and preserved the Faith.  / Therefore, we celebrate your
holy memory today,  / and by your prayers, we receive the remission of our sins.

kontakion.text: As one who has become a citizen of Zion on high, / you had been ordained to the throne of Zion below. / You guided your flock to the heavenly sheepfold, blessed Simeon, / and for the sake of Christ, you were crucified, / imitating His passion.

saints.name: Venerable Stephen, Abbot of the Kiev Far Caves, and Bishop of Vladimir, in Volhynia

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Stephen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
